emails.subject: IVIG referral - Yellen, Sandra
emails.body_text:

Hudson Valley Neurology Associates

Nancy Park

emails.subject: CareIG — Consent Form Required | Yellen
emails.body_text:
Dear Sandra,

Thank you for speaking with us. Dr. Choi has referred you to CareIG Specialty Pharmacy for home IVIG infusion therapy.

Before we can proceed with verifying your insurance and scheduling your first visit, we need a signed Consent for Treatment and Financial Responsibility form. Please find the form attached.

You may sign and return it by:
- Replying to this email with the signed form attached
- Faxing to (888) 555-0147

Once we verify your insurance, we will also contact you with your estimated out-of-pocket costs before scheduling.

If you have any questions, please call us at (888) 555-0147.

Mia Hamilton
CareIG Specialty Pharmacy, Intake
intake@careig.com
(888) 555-0147

emails.subject: Records Request — Sandra Yellen DOB 11/03/1958
emails.body_text:
To Whom It May Concern,

This office represents Sandra Yellen (DOB: 11/03/1958) in a pending medical legal violation matter. We are writing to request copies of any and all records related to Ms. Yellen's care at CareIG Specialty Pharmacy, including but not limited to:

- Referral documentation and correspondence
- Intake records
- Prior authorization submissions and correspondence

Additionally, please confirm the name and dosage of any medications prescribed or administered to Ms. Yellen, and the identity of the referring physician.

This request is made pursuant to the patient's written authorization, which is enclosed. Please direct all responsive documents to the undersigned at the address below within 30 days.

If you have any questions regarding this request, please do not hesitate to contact me directly.

Regards,
Rachel Whitfield, Esq.
Whitfield & Associates, LLP
340 Main Street, Suite 700
Poughkeepsie, NY 12601
rwhitfield@whitfieldlaw.com
(845) 905-3310
